message:
fix(security): add missing JSON escape sequences for \b and \f

The _json_escape function was missing escape handling for backspace (\b)
and form feed (\f) characters, which could produce invalid JSON output
if the input contained these control characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1054,6 +1054,8 @@ verify_all_installers_json() {
         str="${str//$'\t'/\\t}"
         str="${str//$'\r'/\\r}"
         str="${str//$'\n'/\\n}"
+        str="${str//$'\b'/\\b}"
+        str="${str//$'\f'/\\f}"
         echo -n "$str"
     }
